changes: Consolidated Reports functionality into the Dashboard for a unified business overview.
Removed the standalone Reports tab to streamline navigation and reduce clutter.
Separated Monthly Sales metrics into three dedicated cards: Product Sales, eLoad Sales, and GCash Sales.
Added an 'Analytics & Long-term Insights' section to the Dashboard with weekly and monthly trend charts.
Integrated Category Revenue Breakdown into the Dashboard with visual progress bars.
Restructured the Inventory status grid into a single horizontal row for better space utilization.
